positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mandala-style illustration of bioluminescent cosmic flora and fauna. The scene features stylized, swirling nebulae intertwined with crystalline jungle plants and elegant, symmetrical insects. The overall aesthetic is a blend of Art Nouveau and vintage engraved illustration, using deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, gold leaf accents, and matte black ink. Composition must be centered, designed as a circular, repeating pattern with strong, clear silhouettes suitable for all-over textile printing. High contrast linework, intricate detail, ornamental, vector art quality, clean edges, graphic novel ink style.
negative: blurry, grainy, watermark, text, logo, signature, out of focus, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, bokeh, messy, gradient, photo, photorealistic
